metadata.description: Perlin noise procedural texture - custom implementation required

summary: Generates Perlin noise pattern procedurally. Unity has no native Perlin noise node - requires custom function or approximation.

parameters.Detail: Number of octaves for fractal brownian motion (fBm)

implementation.approach_1: Use Unity Noise package (com.unity.shadergraph) if available
implementation.approach_2: Custom HLSL function implementing Perlin-like noise
implementation.approach_3: Approximate with sine waves or simpler patterns

complexity: High - Perlin noise implementation is non-trivial in HLSL
compatibility_loss_25_percent: Exact noise algorithm differs; visual appearance similar but not identical to Blender
typical_use: Clouds, stone, marble, procedural terrain, organic variation
